title: bistorta emodi subsp. emodi
intro: Bistorta emodi subsp. emodi, also known as Himalayan bistort, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Bistorta emodi subsp. emodi are used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
